  • Uses of WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult in oshi.driver.windows.wmi

    Methods in oshi.driver.windows.wmi that return WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32BaseBoard.BaseBoardProperty>
    Win32BaseBoardFFM.queryBaseboardInfo()
    Queries the Baseboard description.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Bios.BiosProperty>
    Win32BiosFFM.queryBiosInfo()
    Queries the BIOS description.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Processor.BitnessProperty>
    Win32ProcessorFFM.queryBitness()
    Returns address width.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Process.CommandLineProperty>
    Win32ProcessFFM.queryCommandLines(Set<Integer> pidsToQuery)
    Returns process command lines.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32ComputerSystem.ComputerSystemProperty>
    Win32ComputerSystemFFM.queryComputerSystem()
    Queries the Computer System.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSAcpiThermalZoneTemperature.TemperatureProperty>
    MSAcpiThermalZoneTemperatureFFM.queryCurrentTemperature()
    Queries the current temperature.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32DiskDrive.DiskDriveProperty>
    Win32DiskDriveFFM.queryDiskDrive(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Queries disk drive information.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32LogicalDiskToPartition.DiskToPartitionProperty>
    Win32LogicalDiskToPartitionFFM.queryDiskToPartition(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Queries the association between logical disk and partition.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32DiskDriveToDiskPartition.DriveToPartitionProperty>
    Win32DiskDriveToDiskPartitionFFM.queryDriveToPartition(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Queries the association between disk drive and partition.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.LhmSensor.LhmHardwareProperty>
    LhmSensorFFM.queryGpuHardware()
    Queries all GPU hardware entries from LHM to discover parent identifiers.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.OhmHardware.IdentifierProperty>
    OhmHardwareFFM.queryHwIdentifier(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h, String typeToQuery, String typeName)
    Queries the hardware identifiers for a monitored type.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32ComputerSystemProduct.ComputerSystemProductProperty>
    Win32ComputerSystemProductFFM.queryIdentifyingNumberUUID()
    Queries the Computer System Product.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32LogicalDisk.LogicalDiskProperty>
    Win32LogicalDiskFFM.queryLogicalDisk(String nameToMatch, boolean localOnly)
    Queries logical disk information
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32OperatingSystem.OSVersionProperty>
    Win32OperatingSystemFFM.queryOsVersion()
    Queries the Operating System version.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32DiskPartition.DiskPartitionProperty>
    Win32DiskPartitionFFM.queryPartition(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Queries the partition.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSFTStorage.PhysicalDiskProperty>
    MSFTStorageFFM.queryPhysicalDisks(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Query the physical disks.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32PhysicalMemory.PhysicalMemoryProperty>
    Win32PhysicalMemoryFFM.queryPhysicalMemory()
    Queries physical memory info for Win10 and later.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32PhysicalMemory.PhysicalMemoryPropertyWin8>
    Win32PhysicalMemoryFFM.queryPhysicalMemoryWin8()
    Queries physical memory info for Win8 and earlier.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Printer.PrinterProperty>
    Win32PrinterFFM.queryPrinters()
    Queries printer information.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Process.ProcessXPProperty>
    Win32ProcessFFM.queryProcesses(Collection<Integer> pids)
    Returns process info.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Processor.ProcessorIdProperty>
    Win32ProcessorFFM.queryProcessorId()
    Returns processor ID.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.LhmSensor.LhmSensorProperty>
    LhmSensorFFM.querySensors(String parent, String sensorType)
    Queries all sensors of a given type belonging to a specific hardware parent.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.OhmSensor.ValueProperty>
    OhmSensorFFM.querySensorValue(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h, String identifier, String sensorType)
    Queries the sensor value of a hardware identifier and sensor type.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Bios.BiosSerialProperty>
    Win32BiosFFM.querySerialNumber()
    Queries the BIOS serial number.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Fan.SpeedProperty>
    Win32FanFFM.querySpeed()
    Queries the fan speed.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSFTStorage.StoragePoolToPhysicalDiskProperty>
    MSFTStorageFFM.queryStoragePoolPhysicalDisks(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Query the storage pool to physical disk connection.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSFTStorage.StoragePoolProperty>
    MSFTStorageFFM.queryStoragePools(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Query the storage pools.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32VideoController.VideoControllerProperty>
    Win32VideoControllerFFM.queryVideoController()
    Queries video controller info.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSFTStorage.VirtualDiskProperty>
    MSFTStorageFFM.queryVirtualDisks(WmiQueryHandlerFFM h)
    Query the virtual disks.
    static WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32Processor.VoltProperty>
    Win32ProcessorFFM.queryVoltage()
    Returns processor voltage.

    Method
    Description

    WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T>
    WmiQueryHandlerFFM.queryWMI(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiQuery<T> query)
    Query WMI for values.

    WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T>
    WmiQueryHandlerFFM.queryWMI(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiQuery<T> query, boolean initCom)
    Query WMI for values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    String
    WmiUtilFFM.getDateString(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Date value from a WmiResult as a String in ISO 8601 format.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    OffsetDateTime
    WmiUtilFFM.getDateTime(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a DateTime value from a WmiResult as an OffsetDateTime.

    float
    WmiUtilFFM.getFloat(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Float value from a WmiResult.

    String
    WmiUtilFFM.getRefString(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Reference value from a WmiResult as a String.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    int
    WmiUtilFFM.getSint32(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Sint32 value from a WmiResult.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    String
    WmiUtilFFM.getString(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a String value from a WmiResult.

    int
    WmiUtilFFM.getUint16(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Uint16 value from a WmiResult.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    int
    WmiUtilFFM.getUint32(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a UINT32 value from a WmiResult.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    long
    WmiUtilFFM.getUint32asLong(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a UINT32 value from a WmiResult as a long, preserving the unsignedness.
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    long
    WmiUtilFFM.getUint64(WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result, T property, int index)
    Gets a Uint64 value from a WmiResult (parsing the String).
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    void
    WbemcliUtilFFM.populateRow(MemorySegment pObject, Arena arena, WbemcliUtilFFM.WmiResult<T> result)
    Populates a WmiResult row from an IWbemClassObject by reading each property defined in the enum.
